title: The secret of magnetic motors
description:
Sorry about the sound quality - I must get a better microphone.
Ok, so this is based on the work of Gary and his neutral line theory - which seems to be true. As the keeper is moved towards the horseshoe magnet the induce field in the keeper goes through three phases - an initial phase, a neutral phase and a reversed pole phase. To my mind this could well be the answer to a lot of flux switching machines and a lot of magnetic motors out there. I plan on working with this idea but it is also a result well worth sharing
